about.label: About
about.title: My story
about.sub: From Bangladesh to Venice, with code and curiosity in between.
about.story_p1: I'm Farhan Abdullah, a full-stack developer passionate about clean code and scalable solutions. Native to Bangladesh, I moved to Italy in 2010 and completed my education here.
about.story_p2: I earned my Computer Science diploma in 2017 and have since specialized in the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js) and Next.js. I love creating modern, responsive, and multilingual web applications that solve real-world problems.
about.story_p3: Beyond coding, I'm passionate about personal growth, fitness (especially calisthenics), and studying Islamic history. I believe in lifelong learning and the quality of the code I write.
about.profession_detail: Full-Stack Developer specializing in MERN stack and Next.js
about.fitness_detail: Passionate about calisthenics and bodyweight training
about.interests_detail: Tech news, Islamic history, personal development
about.values_desc: In my work, I strive to maintain these core principles:
about.cta_desc: Whether you have a specific project in mind or just want to talk tech, I'm always available.
